items.title: Amazon launches new $1 billion FDE org, following OpenAI and Anthropic
items.summary: Engineers on the new team will embed within companies to deploy purpose-built agents, focusing on fast deployments and customer self-sufficiency.
items.titleZh: 继OpenAI和Anthropic之后，亚马逊推出了新的10亿美元的FDE组织
items.summaryZh: 新团队的工程师将嵌入公司内部，部署专门构建的代理，专注于快速部署和客户自给自足。

items.title: Arcturus could halve the grid’s electrical losses using its nano-infused copper
items.summary: Stealthy startup Arcturus uses lasers to infuse carbon nanomaterials into copper, dramatically improving its ability to conduct electricity.
items.titleZh: Arcturus可以使用其纳米注入的铜将电网的电损耗减半
items.summaryZh: 隐形初创公司Arcturus使用激光将碳纳米材料注入铜中，大大提高了其导电能力。

items.title: AWS puts $1 billion into new AI unit to embed engineers with customers, joining growing wave
items.summary: AWS FDEs will look to leave behind self-sufficient teams with new AI solutions and capabilities in a matter of weeks, the company said.
items.titleZh: AWS向新的人工智能部门投入10亿美元，将工程师嵌入客户，加入不断增长的浪潮
items.summaryZh: 该公司表示，AWS FDE将在几周内留下自给自足的团队，提供新的人工智能解决方案和功能。

items.title: Podcasting platform Riverside enters the newsletter publishing game
items.summary: Podcasting platform Riverside enters the newsletter publishing game | TechCrunchtechcrunch.com
items.titleZh: 播客平台Riverside进入时事通讯发布游戏

items.title: Tesla begins ‘engineering tests’ of first production Cybercab in Austin
items.summary:
Tesla says it has started engineering tests of its first production Cybercab on public roads in Austin, marking the first time a customer-spec unit of the purpose-built robotaxi has been validated outside the factory.
But a video shared by the company shows t…
items.titleZh: 特斯拉在奥斯汀开始对第一辆量产Cybercab进行“工程测试”
items.summaryZh: 特斯拉表示，它已经开始在奥斯汀的公共道路上对其第一辆生产的Cybercab进行工程测试，这标志着专门制造的机器人出租车的客户规格单元首次在工厂外得到验证。

items.title: Jon and Mindy Gray bet $55M on AI to catch cancer before it starts
items.summary: A new institute at Penn’s Basser Center will use artificial intelligence and biomarkers to intercept hereditary cancers at their earliest stages, before they become disease. The idea behind the gift is unusual enough to need its own word. Most cancer philanth…
items.titleZh: Jon和Mindy Gray在人工智能上下注5500万美元，在癌症开始前感染癌症
items.summaryZh: 宾夕法尼亚大学巴塞尔中心的一个新研究所将使用人工智能和生物标志物在遗传性癌症成为疾病之前的早期阶段拦截它们。礼物背后的想法很不寻常，需要它自己的话。大多数癌症慈善机构…

items.title: Elon Musk is bashing MacKenzie Scott's giving once again
items.summary: Elon Musk took fresh aim at MacKenzie Scott's giving to progressive causes, as he faced backlash for spearheading cuts to US foreign aid last year.
items.titleZh: 埃隆·马斯克再次抨击麦肯齐·斯科特的捐赠
items.summaryZh: 埃隆·马斯克（Elon Musk）重新瞄准了麦肯齐·斯科特（MacKenzie Scott）对进步事业的捐赠，因为他去年率先削减了美国的对外援助，遭到了强烈反对。

items.title: Marc Andreessen joins the Pentagon’s board, and the old line blurs
items.summary: Andreessen now advises the Pentagon’s leadership on the very decisions his firm has invested billions around. It is legal, and it raises a question the rules were built to answer. Pete Hegseth announced the membership of a freshly cleared-out Defense Policy B…
items.titleZh: 马克·安德森加入五角大楼董事会，旧的界限模糊了
items.summaryZh: 安德森现在就他的公司投资数十亿美元的决策向五角大楼领导层提供建议。这是合法的，它提出了一个规则旨在回答的问题。Pete Hegseth宣布了新成立的国防政策委员会的成员…

items.title: At the heart of Anthropic’s clashes with the U.S. government, a decision not to play by the new rules of Trump’s Washington
items.summary: Most tech companies have tried to curry favor with the White House and hired 'Trump whisperers.' Anthropic has stood on principle, and suffered the consequences.
items.titleZh: Anthropic与美国政府冲突的核心是，决定不遵守特朗普华盛顿的新规则
items.summaryZh: 大多数科技公司都试图讨好白宫，并雇佣了“特朗普耳语者”。“Anthropic坚持原则，并遭受了后果。

items.title: After Harvey, vertical AI’s next $10B winner might be in agriculture
items.summary: In legal, Harvey crossed an $11 billion valuation and Legora is racing to claim the European market behind it. In healthcare, Abridge has built a multi-billion-dollar business turning clinical conversations into structured medical records. In customer service…
items.titleZh: 继哈维之后，垂直人工智能的下一个100亿美元的赢家可能是农业
items.summaryZh: 在法律方面，Harvey的估值超过了110亿美元，Legora正在竞相争夺其背后的欧洲市场。在医疗保健方面，Abridge建立了一项价值数十亿美元的业务，将临床对话转化为结构化的医疗记录。在客户服务…
